problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation may resolve Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
